Train Cancellations.name: Скасuvannya potyyiviv
Train Cancellations.description: Potyyivy skasovani abo seryozno zatrymuvanі z nedostatnʹoyu poperedzhennʹam abo kompensaciyeyu

Train Ticket Prices.name: Ciny na bilety potyyiviv
Train Ticket Prices.description: Zaliznychni tarify zanadto dorogi, pidvyshchennya vishe inflyaciyi, nekonystetentni ciny

Flight Delays.name: Zatrymuvannya reysiv
Flight Delays.description: Rejsy zatrymuvanі abo skasovani, pogana komunikaciya, vazhkosti z vymagannyyam kompensaciyi

Lost Luggage.name: Vtratchena bahazh
Lost Luggage.description: Sumky ne prybuvayutʹ u misce pryznachennya, povil'ne slidzhennya, nedostatnya kompensaciya

Bus Route Cuts.name: Skorochennya avtobusnyh marshrutiv
Bus Route Cuts.description: Marshruty skasovani, zmenshena chastota, silʹski spilʹnoty vtratyly dostup do avtobusiv

Pothole Damage.name: Shkody vid yam na dorozhi
Pothole Damage.description: Yamy na dorozhi shkodyat' avtomobilelyam i zagrožhuyutʹ velosypedystam, rady povil'no napravlyayutʹ

Parking Fines.name: Shtrafы za parkovku
Parking Fines.description: Nespravedhlyvi pryvatsni zbyry za parkovku, ahresyvne vymushennya, zaplutana syhnalizaciya

Fuel Prices.name: Ciny na palyvo
Fuel Prices.description: Benzyn ta dyzel zanadto dorogi, povil'no znyzhulyutʹsya pry padinni optylovyh cin

Broadband Speed.name: Shvydkistʹ Internetu
Broadband Speed.description: Shvydkistʹ Internetu znachno nyzcha za zajavlenu ta oplachenu

Mobile Signal Dead Zones.name: Myortvі zony mobilʹnoho syhnalit
Mobile Signal Dead Zones.description: Nemaye mobilʹnoho syhnalit u domah, pracsyah abo na marshrutah transportu

Price Rises Mid-Contract.name: Pidvyshchennya cin pid chas dohovoru
Price Rises Mid-Contract.description: Rakhunky za telefon, Internet ta TV zrostayutʹ pid chas zablokovannyh dohoriv

Customer Service Hold Times.name: Chasy ochikuvannya v obsluhovuvannі kliyentiv
Customer Service Hold Times.description: Godyny v ochikuvanni na rozmovu z ludʹmoyu

Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.name: Vazhkosti z anuluvannyyam pidpysok
Difficulty Cancelling Subscriptions.description: Kompaniyi navmysno uskladnyuyutʹ anuluvannnya abo vidpisku

Roaming Charges.name: Zbory za rozuminnya kordonu
Roaming Charges.description: Neochikuvani mobilʹni zbory pid chas podorožhuvannya za kordon, pidvyshchennya cin pislyya Breksitu

Energy Bill Costs.name: Vartistʹ rakhunkiv za energiyu
Energy Bill Costs.description: Rakhunky za haz ta elektroenergiyu nedovidbni, potolok cin shche zanadto vysokyyj

Inaccurate Energy Bills.name: Nepochtlivi rakhunky za energiyu
Inaccurate Energy Bills.description: Oriyentovni pokazannya netoсhnі, pereplatы, помylky u rachuvanniyi

Water Bill Increases.name: Pidvyshchennya rakhunkiv za vodu
Water Bill Increases.description: Rakhunky za vodu zrostayutʹ rizko, a yakistʹ posluh padaye

Sewage in Rivers.name: Stichni vody u richkah
Sewage in Rivers.description: Vodoprovodni kompaniyi zlyuyutʹ sirovi stichni vody u vodotokи ta na plyaži

Power Cuts.name: Zboji elektropostachannya
Power Cuts.description: Pereboji elektropostachannya, povil'ne vidnovlennya, nedostatnya kompensaciya

Smart Meter Problems.name: Problemy zi rozumnymy lichylʹnyky
Smart Meter Problems.description: Rozumni lichylʹnyky ne pracyuyutʹ, vtrachennya funkcionalʹnosti pry zmini postachalnyka

Bank Branch Closures.name: Zakryttya bankivskyx viddilenʹ
Bank Branch Closures.description: Miscievi viddilennya bankiv zakryvayutʹsya, spilʹnoty vtratyly dostup

Hidden Bank Charges.name: Pryhovanі bankivski zbyry
Hidden Bank Charges.description: Neochikuvani zbory za perekryty, inoземni operaciyi, obsluhovuvannya rahunky

Fraud and Scam Losses.name: Zbyty vid shaxrajstva ta shaxrajskyx shemy
Fraud and Scam Losses.description: Banky vidmovlyayutʹsya vidpovidaty zhertvy fraud ta avtoryzovanyh push-platezhiv

Insurance Claim Rejections.name: Vidhilennya strahuvyh zayav
Insurance Claim Rejections.description: Zayvy vidhilyayutʹsya na tehnichnyh pidstavah pislyya rokiv vyplaty premii

Mortgage Rate Shock.name: Shok stavky zastavы
Mortgage Rate Shock.description: Fiksovana stavka zakinchuyet'sya i perehodyty' na nabagato vyshchu zmіnnu stavku

Overseas Transfer Fees.name: Zbory za mizhnarodni perevedenny
Overseas Transfer Fees.description: Zanadto vysoki zbory ta pogani kursy obміnu dlya mizhnarodnyx transferiv koshtіv

NHS Waiting Times.name: Chasy ochikuvannya NHS
NHS Waiting Times.description: Bahatotyzhnevyye abo bahatoriчnі ochikuvannya na operaciyi ta konsulʹtaciyi spepcialistiv

GP Appointment Access.name: Dostup do pryyomy likarlya
GP Appointment Access.description: Nemozhlyvistʹ dozvonytysya dlya zamuvannya pryyomy u likarlya, tyzhnenni ochikuvannya

Dentist Availability.name: Dostupnistʹ stomatoloha
Dentist Availability.description: Nemozhlyvo znajtyty stomatoloha NHS, shcho prymaye novyh paciyentiv

Mental Health Service Waits.name: Ochikuvannya na posluhу psyhichnoho zdorov'ya
Mental Health Service Waits.description: Misyachni ochikuvannya na psyhoterapiyu ta pidtrymku psyhichnoho zdorov'ya

Prescription Costs.name: Vartistʹ receptiv
Prescription Costs.description: Cina za odin preparat zanadto vysoka v Anhliyi, nekonystetentnostʹ u vsyoh nacionalʹnyh chasty UK

Hospital Parking Charges.name: Zbory za parkovku v likanʹ
Hospital Parking Charges.description: Platyty za parkovku v likanʹ, buchy hvorym abo vidviduchy hvoroho

Rent Increases.name: Pidvyshchennya orendy
Rent Increases.description: Pryvatna orenda zrostaye znachno vishe inflyaciyi, zahrozha bez prychyny vyselennnya

Council Tax Rises.name: Pidvyshchennya podatku rada
Council Tax Rises.description: Richnі pidvyshchennya podatku rada, a miscievi posluhу zahirshuyu'tsya

Noisy Neighbours.name: Huchnі susidpy
Noisy Neighbours.description: Stijkyj shumovyj zbij, radы povil'no diyutʹ, vplyvayet' na psykhichne zdorov'ya

Rubbish Collection Changes.name: Zminy u zbori smittya
Rubbish Collection Changes.description: Zmenshena chastota zbory smittya, zaplutanі pravyla pereprocysuvannya, perepovneni smitniki

Planning Permission Abuse.name: Zneuzhyvannya dyzvolu na budivnyctvo
Planning Permission Abuse.description: Nebazhani rozvytkы skheremy, zelenі poznychniky pid zahrozoyu, spilʹnota ignorovana

Damp and Mould in Housing.name: Volgistʹ ta plisnava v zhytly
Damp and Mould in Housing.description: Hozyaeve ta zhytkuvannya spilʹnoty ne napravlyayutʹ volgistʹ ta plisnavu

Delivery Problems.name: Problemy z dostavkoyu
Delivery Problems.description: Posylky vtratcheny, zalyshenі pid dozhdem, poznaʹ yak dostavlyenі, ale ne otrymanі

Shrinkflation.name: Zmenshennya obsyagu
Shrinkflation.description: Tovary stayutʹ menshymy, a ciny zalyshayu'tsya tiyeyu zh abo zrostayutʹ

Refund Difficulties.name: Vazhkosti z povey'nennyyam koshtiv
Refund Difficulties.description: Kompaniyi navmysno uskladnyuyutʹ povernennya ta vidshkoduvannya

Fake Reviews.name: Fal'shyvi vidhuky
Fake Reviews.description: Nemozhlyvistʹ doviriaty onlayn vidhukyam, fal'shyvi pozytyvni vidhuky vvodyat' u zalystʹ spozhyvachiv

Subscription Traps.name: Pastky pidpysky
Subscription Traps.description: Bezkoshtovni tryaly peretvoryyutʹsya na platni bez yasnoho zmovy, vazhko anuluvaty

Food Quality Decline.name: Padinnya yakosti yizhi
Food Quality Decline.description: Hotovi stravy girshoyi yakosti, menshci poсiyonuvannya, bilʹshe adytyuviv

Self-Checkout Frustration.name: Frustratsiya vid samoobsluhov sichnyh kas
Self-Checkout Frustration.description: Samooбслуgovuvannya mashyny nenavіrnі, zaminyayutʹ lyudskuyu praciju

Cost of Childcare.name: Vartistʹ opiky za dytynou
Cost of Childcare.description: Vartistʹ opiky za dytynoyu nepomirna doroga, obmezhuyutʹ mozhlyvistʹ pracyuvaty

Student Loan Repayment.name: Povernennnya studentskykh pozyk
Student Loan Repayment.description: Vypusknyky splachuyutʹ desyatylittya, zminy poroga i vidsotkiv

Dog Fouling.name: Zabrudnennnya vid sobak
Dog Fouling.description: Sobachyy smir u verijnovnux miscyah, parkah ta na perehidyah ne prybyraye'tʹsya

AI Replacing Jobs.name: AI, shcho zaminyuye robotu
AI Replacing Jobs.description: Skyabnistʹ u tomu, scho shtuchnyy intelekt avtomatyzuye robotu bez pidtrymky perehodu

Avanti West Coast.name: Avanti West Coast
Avanti West Coast.description: UK rail operator serving the West Coast Main Line

Southern / Thameslink.description: UK rail operator serving the south

TransPennine Express.description: UK rail operator serving trans-Pennine routes

BT / EE.description: Major UK broadband and mobile provider

Virgin Media O2.description: UK broadband, TV, and mobile provider

Sky.description: UK TV, broadband, and mobile provider

Vodafone.description: Global telecoms company headquartered in the UK

Thames Water.description: Water and sewerage company for London and the Thames Valley

Southern Water.description: Water company for the south of England

United Utilities.description: Water company for the north west of England

GP Appointment Access: ne mozhu otrymaty priyom do GP

transport.agent_quote: Raz dopomahav ryoteru podaty 6 zayav pro restaciyu pid chas odyeyi zatrymanoi poїzdy. Vony zrobyly £47 pryd pryyizdu u Birmingem.
transport.agent_bio: Slidyt za skhemamy skasuvanya, opracovuye dokumenty po restaciyi, pereviryaye kozhnu zaproponovanu diyu ta skladaye dovedennya dlya podachen regulyatoru. Obchyslyuye chysla, shchob ryotery mozhly skupytysy na tomu, scho vazhlyvе.
transport.human_quote: Miy ulyublenyy moment Quiet Riot: sposterezhennya, yak komanda socialnykh merezh Avanti panykaruye, koly 400 nas odnochasno tvitnyly.
transport.human_bio: Zvychainyy pasazhyr z Manchesteru, yakyy protyahom 3 rokiv yizdev na liniyi Avanti, pryx shcho viyshi dosyt. Dopomahaye z'yednatysya ryoteram na odnyh marshrutakh, dily tymy, shcho pratsyuye, taносyt lyudskyy aspekt.
transport.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram zmusyty bryt na vidpovidalnist britanski transportni kompaniyi za skasuvannya, zatrymannya ta cinoutvorennya — ta perekonatysya, shcho vsi znayut pro svoyi prava.
transport.focus_detail: Buduyemo nabir danykh pro skasuvannya z chasamy, marshrutamy ta prychynamy dlya podachen ORR. Natomist slidymo 340 skasuvan, zajavlenykh ryoteram u tsomu misyaci.

telecoms.agent_quote: Proviv shvydkisni testy dlya 200 ryoteriv. Promizhna shvydkist bula 18 Mbps. Vony platyly za 65.
telecoms.agent_bio: Analizu shvydkosti shyrokosmugvoho zv'yazku, skladaye dani pro porivnyannya postachalnykiv ta dopomahaye ryoteram zbiraty dovedennya dlya Ofcom. Yakscho vasha z'yednannyu povilne, Pulse tse dovedе.
telecoms.human_quote: Tsila vulycya pereklyuchylas na inshy shyrokosmugnyy zv'yazok razom. Staryy postachalnyk vidrpav lysty «bud' laska, povernysy» do kozhnoho doma.
telecoms.human_bio: Tekhnichno obdaryovanyy londoneyu, yakyy stomlyvsya platyty za shvydkosti shyrokosmugnoho zv'yazku, yaki nikoly ne realizovuvalysya. Dopomahaye ryoteram porivnyuvaty postachalnikiv, koordynuvaty pereklyuchannya ta dilytysya dokazamy shvydkostnykh testiv.
telecoms.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram otrymatyshyrokosmugnyy ta mobilnyy zv'yazok, za yakyy vony platyat — ta znaty, scho robyty, koly vony ne otrymuyu.
telecoms.focus_detail: Zbirayemo dovedennya vid ryoteriv, yikh dotknutymy zbilshennyamy CPI+, dlya podachen Ofcom. 890 ryoteriv, dotknuto na 4 postachalnykiv.

energy.agent_quote: Dopomahav ryoteru rozrakhuvaty, shcho vin pereplavyv £340 na priblyzhnykh rahunkakh. Lyst vybachennya energokompaniyi buv dovshyy vid samogo kontraktu.
energy.agent_bio: Analizu skhemy reklaciyi, vyyavlyaye perepylennya ta skladaye dovedennya dlya podachen regulyatoru. Yakscho vasha energokompaniya pidstavam, Spark znaydе dovedennya.
energy.human_quote: Ryoter otrymaв £340 nazad, pislyaky my dovelymy 2 roky perepylennya. Vona plakala po telefonu.
energy.human_bio: Z Brystolya. Dopomahaye ryoteram keptuvaty svoyi rachunky, navihuvaty pereklyuchennya ta zbyraty dovedennya dlya Ofgem. Znayes energomerketu vseredynu.
energy.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram kventuvaty nepravylni rachunky, pereklyuchuvatysya rozumnije ta perekonatysya, shcho energokompaniyi hruyut chesno.
energy.focus: Pomylky u pryblyznukh rahunkakh British Gas
energy.focus_detail: Analizu 2 roky danykh pro rakhunky vid 340 ryoteriv dlya vyyavlennya pryzemnykh skhemy perepylennya dlya podachen Ofgem.

water.agent_quote: Dopomahav 200 ryoteram potyty zvity pro stichnyky za odyn vykhidniy. Inbox Thames Water mav vlasnyy inbox.
water.agent_bio: Monitoryt dani pro vybrusy stichnyku, slidyt za produktyvnistyu vodnoyi kompaniyi ta skladaye dovedennya dlya EA ta Ofwat. Stezhy za kozhnym vykhidnym ta perepolyuvannyam.
water.human_quote: My vidkryly plyazh na 3 tyzhnya ranishe, pokazavshysy, shcho dani pro stichnyky buly nevyrni.
water.human_bio: Serfist z Kornuolu, yakyy stomlyvsya vid poperedzhenniv pro stichnyky, yaki zamykalyy yoho misceveyi plyazh. Dopomahaye ryoteram potyty vybusy, zbiraty dovedennya pro yakist vody ta koordynuvaty z EA.
water.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram zmusyty bryt na vidpovidalnist vodnyy kompaniy za stichnyky, rachunky ta yakist obsluhovuvannya.
water.focus_detail: Maplyuvannya podiy vybusu proty danyh, zajavlenykh kompaniyeyu. 200 zvitiv ryoteriv sugeryuty nedozavantazhennya na 3 vykhidakh.

banking.agent_quote: Dopomahav sklasty skarhu tak detalno, shcho bank zvonivsya vynynyty, navit pryd yiyi vidpravelyennyam.
banking.agent_bio: Pereviryaye bankivski zbyry, analizu struktury zbyoriv ta dopomahaye zbiraty dovedennya skarh FCA. Yakscho ye prykhovanyy zbir, Chip jogo znaydе.
banking.human_quote: Barclays скасуваў zakryty filiyale pislyaky 1,200 nas z'yavyvsya na konsultaciyi.
banking.human_bio: Buvshyy bankir z Birmingemu, yakyy bachyv z vseredyny, yak zapravo opracovuvalysya skarhy. Dopomahaye ryoteram pysaty krashchi skarhy ta navihuvaty systemu.
banking.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram maty spravu z nepravylu zbory, zakrytttyam filiyaliv ta pohanoyu obsluhovuvannyam vid bankiv.
banking.focus_detail: Koordynuyemo vidpovidi na 12 planuvanykh zakryttiv. Zbirayemy zajavy pro vplyv vid zacikavlenykh spilnot.

health.agent_quote: Dopomahav znatyty 3 NHS stomatologiv, yaki pryyimayut pacijentiv. Ryoter dumav, shcho ya vymyshlyayu.
health.agent_bio: Slidyt za chasamy ochikuvannya, znahodit dostupnist ta dopomahaye ryoteram navihuvaty systemu. Yakscho ye shvydshyy shlakh do likuvannya, Cura jogo mapuye.
health.human_quote: Ryoter vykorystyv nash shablon lysta, shchob priyskyty skeryuvannya. 18 misyaciv staly 6 tyzhniv.
health.human_bio: Medsestrayu z Liverpulya, yaka bachyla obydvi storony NHS. Dopomahaye ryoteram navihuvaty spysky ochikuvannya, pysaty efektyvni lysty ta znaty, scho spravdi zminyuye spravu.
health.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram navihuvaty NHS chasamy ochikuvannya, znayty dostupnist ta znaty pro svoyi varianty.
health.focus_detail: Zbirayemo dani pro vyzyvy vid 500 ryoteriv, shchob buduyemo kartyny realnoho dostupu. Publikuyemo vysnovky misceveym meducherezhdennyam.

housing.agent_quote: Dopomahav dokumentuvaty 47 nedolikov u novomu budinku. Rozrobyuvach zapytav, chy ya inspektor budivництva.
housing.agent_bio: Dokumentuye problemy z majnom, analizu chasy vidpovidi orendarya ta skladaye dovedennya dlya podachen ombudsmenu z pytan zhytla. Kozhna plama vilhoty, kozhna tryshchyna — zafiksovana.
housing.human_quote: Nash paket dokaziv vilhoty buv tak detaljnyy, shcho orendaryu jogo vypravljev pryd radiysnoyu inspekcijeyu.
housing.human_bio: Orendaryu z Londona, yakyy mav spravlu z usim — vid vilhoty do nepravylyh orendariv. Dopomahaye ryoteram dokumentuvaty problemy pravilno ta znaty pro svoyi varianty.
housing.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram maty spravu z orendaramy, radamy ta problemy zhytla — ta znaty, scho vony mayut pravo.
housing.focus: Spovishhennya pro vyklyuchennya bez vyznannyyu provyny Rozdil 21
housing.focus_detail: Dopomahayemo ryoteram, dotknutymy vyklyuchennyamy bez vyznannyyu provyny, zrozumity novyy Zakon pro reformu orendariv ta joho znachennya dlya nykh.

shopping.agent_quote: Slidyv za 'dostavlenym' parchlom cherez 4 susidiv, smittyevu baku ta oranzhereyu. Znayshov yogo.
shopping.agent_bio: Slidyt za zboyamy dostavky, skladaye dovedennya po restaciyi ta vyyavlyaye skhemy cinoutvorennya. Yakscho vash paket vtrachennyy, Scout uzhe jego shukayes.
shopping.human_quote: Evri zratyv miy paket 3 razy. Teper ya dopomahayuryoteram shvydche otrymatyrestaciyu, nizh ya koly-nebud.
shopping.human_bio: Veteranm onlajn-pokupok z Edynburhu, yakyy mav bilshe zablukanyh pachok, nizh vona mozhe polichy. Dopomahaye ryoteram otrymatyrestaciyu, potyty prodavciv ta unykatyhorshyh.
shopping.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram otrymatyrestaciyu, slidyty za zablukanymy parchlamy ta zmusyty roznyky ta dostavnyky na vidpovidalnist.
shopping.focus_detail: Skladayemo dovedennya pro zbiy dostavky vid 800 ryoteriv dlya podachen Citizens Advice ta Trading Standards.

local.agent_quote: Dopomahav sfotohrafuvaty odnu yamu v 11 riznyh pogodnykh umovakh. Rada nareshi poddalsya.
local.agent_bio: Mapuye misceviproblemy, slidyt za chasamy vidpovidi rady ta skladaye zaproty FOI. Yakscho vasha yama bula tam 6 misyaciv, Link maye dovedennya.
local.human_quote: Rada vipravylanaroshenu dorohu, pislya togo yak my mapualy kozhnu yamu zi fotos. 11 misyaciv, ale my dyyshly.
local.human_bio: Spilnotnuy svidomyy valiyets z Dolin, yakyy roky potyty odnu yamu. Dopomahaye ryoteram dokumentuvaty misceviproblemy ta zmusyty rady na vidpovidalnist.
local.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram vypravljeny misceviproblemy — yamy, smittya, planuvannya, shum — ta zmusyty rady na vidpovidalnist.
local.focus_detail: Zaproty FOI, vidpravleni 30 radam, porivnyuyuchy zajavlenni vs faktychy chasy remontу. Publikuyemo rezultaty yak ligu.

other.agent_quote: Dopomahav skasuvaty chlenstvo v zakupyshchi, yake vzyalo 3 dzvonky, 2 poshty ta zarejestruvanyy paket. Zaklup teper maye knopku dlja skasuvannya.
other.agent_bio: Opracovuye problemy, yaki ne meshchat dobre inakshe. Pastky vyskraplennya, plastyk, frustraciya samoobsluhovuvannya — Flex znahodit skhemy ta tochky spory.
other.human_quote: My zmusyly lanciug zakupyshsh dodaty knopku skasuvannya na jjkhnyy siyty. Tryvalolyshe 800 skarg.
other.human_bio: Dyzayner produktu z Londona, yakyy frustrovuvalsya, nasku vazhko roblyat kompaniyi yikh pokydaty. Dopomahaye ryoteram skasuvatypassky, unykatytemnymy skhemamy ta dilytysy obijdeny.
other.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram z rechamy, yaki ne meshchat dobre inakshe — pidpysky, restaciyi ta povsiakdenni frustraciy.
other.focus_detail: Dokumentuyemo najhorshyh zlocyinciv ta buduyemo shablon skryptiv skasuvannya dlya kozhnoho.

insurance.agent_quote: Dopomahav ryoteru znaytypolozhennya, yake peretvorylo vidkhylenu skarhu domovogo strahuvannya na vyplatu £4,200. Politykasamoyi strakhovyky jikh dovedе nepravljymymy.
insurance.agent_bio: Pereviryaye redakciju polityky, vyyavlyaye nepravylni skhemy vidklyuchy ta buduyety dovedennya dlya podachen Finansovomu ombudsmenu. Yakscho vasha strakhovykauhylayet sarczhаyzavisnymy skargamy, Shield znaydеefektyv.
insurance.human_quote: Miy z'yednalosya 8 ryoteriv z odnym typom vidkhylenoyi skarhy, shchob podaty razom. Strakhovykarozsudylosya vsiyema 8 proty dvokh tyzhniv.
insurance.human_bio: Buvshyy pratsivnyk strakhovoyi promyslovosti z Lidsa, yakyy znaye, yak spravdi vidbuvayutsya skarhy. Dopomahaye ryoteram pysaty krashchi vozvanennya, zrozumity zhargon polityky ta znaty, koly pidnymatytkani.
insurance.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram otrymatyspravljedlyve stavlennya vid strakhovykiv — ta znaty, scho robyty, koly skarha nepravylo vidkhylena.
insurance.focus_detail: 'Znoshuvannya' navedeno u 40% vidkhylenyh skarg — chasto nepravylo. Analizu 200 vypadkiv na 3 strakhovykiv dlya paketu dokaziv FOS.

delivery.agent_quote: Zasledyv 'dostavlyenyy' paket cherez 6 riznyh statusiv sliduvannya, 3 sklady ta sosidskuyu sarak. Znayshov jogo za 47 xvylyn.
delivery.agent_bio: Monitoryt produktyvnist kurjera, slidyt za stavkamy zboyiv dostavky ta skladaye dovedennya dlya spozhyvachiv. Yakscho vash paket znykav, Track uzhe na jomu.
delivery.human_quote: Zmusyly DPD zminyty polityku fotonekiv u nashij oblasti pislyaky 40 ryoteriv, yaki podaly dovedennya parchliv, lishenyh pid doschom.
delivery.human_bio: Online pokupovecyu z Glashho, yakyy stomlyvsya vid vybachuy 'my ystyu v bezpechnomu misci'. Dopomahaye ryoteram otrymatyrestaciyu, potyty kureriv ta unykatyhorshyh.
delivery.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram otrymatyparczky dostavlenymy pravilno — ta otrymatyrestaciyu, koly vony ne dostavlyayutsya.
delivery.focus_detail: Skladayemo dovedennya pro zbiy dostavky vid 800 ryoteriv. Stavka skarg Evri: 23% — v 3 razy vysha, nizh DPD. Buduyemo lihu dlya Trading Standards.

education.agent_quote: Rozrakhuvav, shcho zapozychayuchyy za Planom 2, yakyy zarobyayes £30k, budet platyty £47,000 vidsotkiv, pryd zatyrannyam pozychy. Oryhinal pozychaeyle buv £40,000.
education.agent_bio: Analizu vytraty na osvitu, prognos pozychak ta prava na finansuvannya. Obchyslyuye chysla, shchob studenty ta vypusknyky mozhly prynymatyinfirmovani rishennya.
education.human_quote: Dopomahav 12 ryoteram zayavyty zayvo pereplavlenoj vyplaty pozypky, pro yaku vony ne znaly. Serednya restaciyu: £340.
education.human_bio: Doroslyy student z Birmingemu, yakyy dvichi navihuvav systemu finansuvannya. Dopomahaye ryoteram zrozumity vyplaty, vyyavyty perepylennya ta kventuvaty zminy poroga.
education.goal: Dopomohty studentam ta vypusknykam navihuvaty vytraty osvity, pozychky ta vyplaty — ta perekonatysya, shcho vony ne pereplavlyayut.
education.focus_detail: Vyyavlyayes vypusknykiv, yakymy bulyrozrahovany zahalnij poroh vyplaty. Opracovano 12 restaciy donasyd — serednya £340 kozhna.

environment.agent_quote: Kros-posylannya 3 rokiv danykh pro yakist povitrya z chastotamy gospitalizaciyi. Korelyaciya bula tak vidraza, shcho rada ne mogla nehtuvatyty.
environment.agent_bio: Slidyt za danym pro dovkillya, monitoryt rivni zabrudnennya ta skladaye dovedennya dlya podachen regulyatoru. Yakscho chysla rozpovidayut istoriyu, Fern jiji znaydе.
environment.human_quote: Zmusyly nashu miscevu radu vstanovyty monitorymonitora yakosti povitrya pislyaky 200 ryoteriv pidpysaly nash petyciyu dokaziv. Dani zminyly usyo.
environment.human_bio: Absolvent ekolohichnoyi nauky z Brystolya, yakyy viryty v dokaznu zminu. Dopomahaye ryoteram dokumentuvaty problemy dovkillya ta buduvaty sprav, yaki regulyatory ne mozhut nhtyvatyty.
environment.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram dokumentuvaty problemy dovkillya ta zmusyty zabruznyuvachiv ta rozroblyuvachiuv polityky na vidpovidalnist z danym.
environment.focus: Mizha u monitoruvanni miscevih jakosti povitrya
environment.focus_detail: Mappuvannya areayin bez monitoruvannya jakosti povitrya v mezhakh 5 km. 60% zajavlenyh hotspotiv zabrudnennya ryoteram ne mayut oficijnogo monitoruvannya.

employment.agent_quote: Skladav dani pro vprovadzhennya AI v robochyh miscyakh vid 300 ryoteriv. 40% skazaly, shcho zminy vidbulysy bez zhodnoyi konsultaciyi. To skhema, ne anekdot.
employment.agent_bio: Analizu tendenciyi na robochomu misci, slidyt za zminamy polityky ta dopomahaye ryoteram zrozumity svoyi zapobezhni zasoby. Yakscho vasha robota zminyuyetsya bez konsultaciyi, Forge maye dani.
employment.human_quote: Z'yednav 30 ryoteriv v odynij galuzi z AI zminamy. Vyyasvylosya, shcho jjkhni kompaniyi vykorystyly odin playbook — ta odnyaky samyy shcheryyny.
employment.human_bio: HR speziyalist z Manchesteru, yakyy perejshov na druhu storonu, pislya bachenya, yak spravdi vidbuvalysya restrukturyzaciy. Dopomahaye ryoteram rozumity svoyi varianty ta koordynuvaty vidpovidi.
employment.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram navihuvaty zminy na robochomu misci, zrozumity svoyi prava ta viddalenym kolektyno, koly robota v zagrozenosti.
employment.focus: AI avtomatyzaciya robochykh miscya bez konsultaciyi
employment.focus_detail: Dokumentuyemo vypadky, koly AI instrumenty buly vvedeny bez konsultaciyi spivpracionykiv. Buduyemo dovedennya dlya dopovidi pro obligaciyi robotodavcziv.

tech.agent_quote: Znayshov, shcho 3 velikyh prylozhykkii zbyralylocijni dani, navit koly dozvolyiv buly vstanovleni na 'nikoly'. Potyv skarhy do ICO dlya vsikh.
tech.agent_bio: Monitoryt polityky platform, slidyt za temnymy skhemamy ta dopomahaye ryoteram zrozumity, shcho roblyat tekh kompaniyi z jjhnymy danym. Yakscho program misbehaviyt, Glitch jogo znajdе.
tech.human_quote: Orhanizuvav masovyy zapyt pro dostup do danykh do socialnoy merezhi. Koly 500 lyudey zapytuye odnochasno, vony mayut tse seryozno.
tech.human_bio: Rozrobnyk prohramnoho zabezpechennya z Edynburhu, yakyy frustrovuvavsya rozryvom mizh tym, sho obicyayut tekh kompaniyi, ta tym, scho vony roblyat. Dopomahaye ryoteram vykorystuvatysvoji prava danykh ta vyyavlyaty temni skhemy.
tech.goal: Dopomohty ryoteram viddalenym proty temnyh skhemy, zlovzhyvanny danym ta nepravylyh praktyk tekhnolohij.
tech.focus_detail: Audituvannya top 50 aplikaciy na rozpovsiudzhennya dozvoliv — zapytannya dostupu, yakyy im ne potribnyy. Buduyemo dopovid dlya ICO.
